messages.subject: Notes from the Universe
messages.body:
The fastest way to change how you feel, is to change what you're thinking about.

Works every time.

The Universe

messages.subject: Notes from the Universe
messages.body:
You were given this life because you were strong enough to live it.

And curious enough to wonder what would happen if you did.

Still wondering,
The Universe

messages.subject: Notes from the Universe
messages.body:
Someday you're going to look back on this time in your life as such an important time of preparing for what was to come.

You won't remember the hard parts. You'll remember that you kept going.

The Universe
